command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
SECRET="65b0642ca8a7fc2ae28fa8e8234895cd38fc88933dd9bf6a45157546c66b98a6"
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

echo "=== TEST A: message WITH @mention as proper entity (what dropdown sends) ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  A status: %{http_code}\n" -X POST http://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: $SECRET" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":900001,"message":{"message_id":900001,"date":1749645000,"chat":{"id":-1003934415467,"type":"supergroup","title":"DevilDollzllc"},"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"text":"@SakuraChanAssistant_bot are you there","entities":[{"offset":0,"length":24,"type":"mention"}]}}'
sleep 12
echo "  --- log after A ---"
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "inbound|response|skip|mention" | tail -4
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

echo ""
echo "=== TEST B: plain text mention (no entity), lowercase match path ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  B status: %{http_code}\n" -X POST http://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: $SECRET" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":900002,"message":{"message_id":900002,"date":1749645001,"chat":{"id":-1003934415467,"type":"supergroup","title":"DevilDollzllc"},"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"text":"@SakuraChanAssistant_bot hello test B"}}'
sleep 12
echo "  --- log after B ---"
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "inbound|response|skip|mention" | tail -4
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

echo ""
echo "=== TEST C: NO mention at all (should be SKIPPED with require_mention:true) ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  C status: %{http_code}\n" -X POST http://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: $SECRET" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":900003,"message":{"message_id":900003,"date":1749645002,"chat":{"id":-1003934415467,"type":"supergroup","title":"DevilDollzllc"},"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"text":"just chatting no mention test C"}}'
sleep 12
echo "  --- log after C ---"
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "inbound|response|skip|mention" | tail -4

echo ""
echo "=== What is the bot's actual known username? ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getMe' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('username:', json.load(sys.stdin)['result']['username'])"
REMOTE
